scope_note: Penn does not publish a minimum GPA cutoff on these admissions pages. This panel instead summarizes the official transcript/context guidance used in review.
policy_summary: Penn does not publish a minimum GPA. Instead, it reviews grades in core subjects, the school profile, and whether the transcript prepares the student for the undergraduate school or program they selected.

what_mit_does_say.claim: Penn reviews each school profile to understand course offerings, grading scale, and opportunities.
Penn asks whether grades in core subjects show readiness for the specific academic program chosen by the applicant.
Penn also says there is no minimum score required on the SAT or ACT to apply.
